name: Amaretto Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and 1 1/2 cups sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in egg yolks one at a time.
3. Fold in beaten egg whites.
4. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt, adding to batter a little at a time, alternating with sour cream. Stir until smooth.
5. Mix in grated orange peel and walnuts. Pour into a buttered 9-inch tube pan.
6. Bake for 50 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Mix remaining sugar with orange juice and Amaretto and spoon over the cake as soon as it comes out of the oven.
8. Cool before removing from the pan.
